reproducibility_signals: Named tools (open-source Kubernetes operator, code reviews on the operator, conference talks, GitHub stars) are real components of a senior IC's reputation surface.

The 'mentees on adjacent staff-engineer hiring panels within twelve months' pattern is observable in real engineering networks — the senior IC pipeline moves between adjacent companies through mentee-network paths.
The 'sabbatical-mid-cutover' scenario reflects a real failure mode: senior engineers do step away under load, and the structural consequences are observable.
The implication offers a structured planning input (which peers, what default-explanation, what shape of exit) — testable in real transition planning.
verdict_reason: Analog reproduces in code (open-source operator), in organisational practice (the staff-engineer hiring loop), and in observable behaviour (the sabbatical-mid-cutover withdrawal pattern). PASS.
